title: Expected emergency decision-support output
reasons: Flood forecast and river-rise inputs are increasing.
The simulated bridge has an aging, low-condition structure with observed scour.
Emergency access and alternative routes are not confirmed.
recommended_actions: Increase qualified inspection frequency when conditions are safe.
Prepare authority-approved emergency communication and traffic-control plans.
Monitor water levels and refresh the assessment as conditions change.
disclaimer: Aegis provides decision support only. Qualified emergency and engineering authorities retain all operational decision-making authority.
